content_of_post_to_comment: It’s important to learn when and how to play dumb. And I don’t mean pretending not to know. I mean understanding that not everything deserves your attention, your energy, or your response. You do not have to comment on everything. You do not have to correct everyone. You do not have to prove that you see what is happening. Wisdom is knowing when to speak and when to remain silent. Some things deserve a conversation. Some things deserve a smile. And some things deserve absolutely nothing. Not every battle needs a soldier. Not every game deserves a player.
